reference_answer: Ren Ido left the trail crew after the winter roster closed.
Mika Sol joined the trail crew for the winter rotation.
Mika Sol replaced Ren Ido as supply coordinator.
Ren Ido no longer held the supply coordinator role.
Before the update, the supply coordinator contact was Ren Ido.
After the update, the supply coordinator contact is Mika Sol.
The crew lead did not change.
